_comment: TheOrc Foundry recipe TEMPLATE — theorc-dataset-judge v0. Follow-on #1 after the toolcaller proof (docs/THEORC_FOUNDRY.md, Follow-On Order).
phase: pre-F-1 (no frozen task universe, no baseline report)

job.name: theorc-dataset-judge-qwen25-0.5b-lora-v0
job.description: Screen Training Pit captures for contamination, leakage, and suitability — protects the data flywheel. Candidate labels already exist: human accept/reject decisions in training_pit/datasets/manifests/reviewed_v1.json plus prescreen/judge script outcomes.

dataset._dataset_note: Task universe not frozen. The natural source is the review record (reviewed_v1.json accept/reject + prescreen_captures.py findings) rendered as capture → suitability verdict examples — build that exporter as this track's first F-1 deliverable.

gates.blocked_reason: Per docs/THEORC_FOUNDRY.md, follow-on tracks start only after the toolcaller proof completes and this track's own baseline comparison (prescreen_captures.py + judge_captures.py ARE the baseline) identifies a measurable gap.

stop_rule: If deterministic prescreen + the existing judge-triage script already match human review decisions within tolerance, do not train — the rules win.
